creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, Oct 15, 2010 at 02:40:13PM +0000, Helmut Schellong wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR kern/105375; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Helmut Schellong <var@schellong.biz>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: kern/105375: [sk] 2 x Marvell GBit LAN: device sk0 is attached,
>  but sk1 not.
> Date: Fri, 15 Oct 2010 16:22:48 +0200
> 

[...]

>  
>  But the installation of 8.0 has cleared permanently one MAC (msk) to 
>  00:00:00:00:00:00! ...

I think this is different issue and there is already opened PR
151169. Because the controller is recognized by msk(4) and PR
151169 reports actual issue for station address, do you agree on
closing this PR and make me work on PR 151169?
